Just for context, she's always struck me as an uber talented big that was poorly utilized on bad teams, so she naturally developed a poor attitude as such. 

If Reeve can get her to buy-in and play a team-concept style of ball, then this is a scary acquisition 😳

items.title: May 28, 1989: Byron Scott drives for an acrobatic and-1 finish during the Lakers’ series-clinching win in Game 4 of the WCF at Phoenix.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 28, 1989: Byron Scott drives for an acrobatic and-1 finish during the Lakers’ series-clinching win in Game 4 of the WCF at Phoenix.

Scott scored 35 PTS (13-18 FG) and Magic Johnson had 21 PTS/20 AST for Los Angeles. The Suns’ Tom Chambers had 41 PTS (17-28 FG)/13 REB/6 AST.
